data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplified online browsing and purchasing processes reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Structured menus, predictive search, and one-click ordering.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Efficient navigation is provided through optimized clickable areas and content layout.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Content is organized into manageable chunks to aid comprehension and retention.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users prefer familiar functionality. Amazon aligns its features with user expectations.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Focus on creating positive experiences at pivotal user journey points.
